title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 446.220 - Fees allowed to owners of abstracts
text:
446.220.  Fees allowed to owners of abstracts. — The owner, owners, keeper or custodian of any such abstracts or land title abstract books shall be allowed to charge for the services rendered under the provisions of sections 446.190 to 446.220 the following fees only:
(RSMo 1939 § 1952) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 1788; 1919 § 5475; 1909 § 6418
